testcase.name: test_get_preferences_default_true
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_weekly_digest.py:50: in test_get_preferences_default_true assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 but got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 but got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
